popularStory.headline: Death
popularStory.description:
Over the years Courtenay acquired considerable property, much of it by way of his marriages. At his death he held 14 manors, principally in the West Country, but also in Essex and Herefordshire.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Courtenay於1359年出生在英國戴文哈可姆時，他的父親Sir Edward Courtenay29歲，母親Emeline Dauney29歲。他於1393年2月11日之前與Lady Elizabeth Cogan結婚。他於1418年在英國戴文被列為sheriff of devon。他去世於1425年3月5日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國戴文哈可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Courtenay于1359年出生在英国戴文哈可姆时，他的父亲Sir Edward Courtenay29岁，母亲Emeline Dauney29岁。他于1393年2月11日之前与Lady Elizabeth Cogan结婚。他于1418年在英国戴文被列为sheriff of devon。他去世于1425年3月5日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国戴文哈可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Courtenay was born in 1359, in Haccombe, Devon, England, his father, Sir Edward Courtenay, was 29 and his mother, Emeline Dauney, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Cogan before 11 February 1393. In 1418, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devon in Devon, England. He died on 5 March 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Haccombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Courtenay est né en 1359, à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Courtenay, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Emeline Dauney, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Cogan avant 11 février 1393. En 1418, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devon à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Courtenay 1359 in Haccombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Courtenay 29 und seine Mutter Emeline Dauney 29. Er hat vor 11. Februar 1393 Lady Elizabeth Cogan geheiratet. 1418 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of devon in Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. März 1425 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Haccombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Courtenay è nato il nel 1359 nel Haccombe, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Courtenay, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Emeline Dauney, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Cogan prima del 11 febbraio 1393. Nel 1418, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devon nel Devon, England. Morì il 5 marzo 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Haccombe, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Courtenayが1359年にイギリスデボンハッコインベで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Courtenayは29歳，母Emeline Dauneyは29歳であった。1393年2月11日以前にLady Elizabeth Coganと結婚した。1418年，イギリスデボンでの職業はsheriff of devonと記録されている。彼は1425年3月5日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスデボンハッコインベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Courtenay(이)가 1359년 영국 데폰 하치브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Courtenay(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Emeline Dauney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1393년 2월 11일 이전 Lady Elizabeth Cogan(와)과 결혼했다. 1418년, 그의 직업은 영국 데폰에서 sheriff of devon이었다. 그는 1425년 3월 5일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 하치브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Courtenay nasceu em 1359, em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Courtenay, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Emeline Dauney, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Cogan antes 11 de fevereiro de 1393. Em 1418, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devon em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Courtenay родился в 1359 г. в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Courtenay было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Emeline Dauney, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Cogan перед 11 февраль 1393 г. В 1418 году он работал по профессии sheriff of devon в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 5 марта 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия.

sm.1418-1419: mai le 1418 e o'o I le 1419

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Courtenay nació en 1359, en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Courtenay, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Emeline Dauney, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Cogan antes de 11 de febrero de 1393. En 1418, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devon en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
